allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix SUNO API key configuration (reapply after merge)

The git merge overwrote the API key fixes. Reapplying:
- Use SUNO_API_KEY environment variable instead of hardcoded key
- Fix Authorization headers to use sunoApiKey variable throughout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix proxy configuration to properly route through Webshare

- Import node-fetch explicitly instead of using native fetch
- Change proxy URL from https:// to http:// protocol
- This ensures requests go through the whitelisted proxy IP

Native fetch in Vercel doesn''t support agent parameter, causing
requests to bypass the proxy and fail IP whitelist checks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive error logging for non-JSON responses

- Capture raw response text before parsing as JSON
- Log response status and headers for debugging
- Handle both JSON and text error responses gracefully
- Show first 200 chars of non-JSON responses

This helps diagnose API errors that return HTML or plain text.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix status check to recognize TEXT_SUCCESS and MUSIC_SUCCESS

KIE.AI API returns TEXT_SUCCESS/MUSIC_SUCCESS when generation is complete,
not ''complete''. Updated the status check to handle these values.

This fixes the timeout issue where polling would continue forever
even though the music was already generated.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix status polling to check msg field instead of status

KIE.AI API returns msg: ''success'' at the root level, not in status field.
Added comprehensive logging to see full status response structure.

This should fix the timeout issue and properly detect when music is ready.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix status check to properly wait for music generation completion

The API always returns msg: ''success'' even when status is PENDING,
causing premature exit from polling loop. Now properly checking:
- data.status field (not msg field)
- Wait for status != PENDING/PROCESSING
- Check if response field is populated

This should properly detect when music generation is complete.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update frontend to handle multiple music tracks from API

Updated music generation UI to:
- Handle tracks array response format
- Display both track variations with titles
- Show album art images for each track
- Use streamAudioUrl for audio player and downloads
- Properly handle download filenames

Fixes greyed out audio player and undefined download issues.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add video generation support with SUNO API

Frontend changes:
- Add image/video toggle to Panel 3
- Show video-specific fields (duration, aspect ratio)
- Update panel title/description dynamically
- Implement video generation function with video player
- Handle video response and display

Backend changes:
- Create /api/generate-video endpoint
- Integrate with KIE.AI SUNO video API
- Support text-to-video generation
- Poll for video completion with extended timeout
- Route through Webshare proxy for IP whitelist

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git commit -m "Fix video API endpoints - use /api/v1/generate/video path")
Bash(git commit -m "Add detailed error logging to video callback handler")
Bash(git commit -m "Use Fal.ai as primary video generation provider with KIE.AI as fallback")
Bash(git commit -m "Fix Fal.ai client import and configuration")
Bash(git commit -m "Add detailed logging and multiple response structure checks for Fal.ai video URL")
Bash(timeout 10 bash -c 'while true; do sleep 1; done')
